creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: brd (doc committer)
Date: Sat May 25 20:01:57 2013
New Revision: 319070
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/319070

Log:
  - Update sysutils/rsyslog7 to 7.2.7
  	- Partially based on work in [1]
  	- Convert to PORTDOCS= and PORTEXAMPLES=
  	- Pet portlint
  - Add sysutils/rsyslog7-devel at version 7.3.15
  
  PR:		176601 [1]
  Submitted by:	Cristiano Rolim Pereira <cristianorolim at outlook.com> [1]
  Reviewed by:	koobs@, jgh@

Added:
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/
     - copied from r319068, head/sysutils/rsyslog7/
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/files/patch-plugins--impstats--impstats.c   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/files/patch-runtime--cryprov.h   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/files/patch-runtime--libgcry.c   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/files/patch-runtime--libgcry.h   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/files/patch-runtime--lmcry_gcry.c   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/files/patch-runtime--queue.c   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/files/patch-runtime--stream.h   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/sysutils/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/distinfo
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/pkg-descr
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/pkg-plist
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7/distinfo
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7/pkg-descr
  head/sysutils/rsyslog7/pkg-plist

Modified: head/sysutils/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/Makefile	Sat May 25 19:48:21 2013	(r319069)
+++ head/sysutils/Makefile	Sat May 25 20:01:57 2013	(r319070)
@@ -813,6 +813,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rsyslog6-devel-rfc3195
     SUBDIR += rsyslog6-devel-snmp
     SUBDIR += rsyslog7
+    SUBDIR += rsyslog7-devel
     SUBDIR += rtty
     SUBDIR += ruby-quota
     SUBDIR += rubygem-SyslogLogger

Modified: head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rsyslog7/Makefile	Sat May 25 19:12:28 2013	(r319068)
+++ head/sysutils/rsyslog7-devel/Makefile	Sat May 25 20:01:57 2013	(r319070)
@@ -1,25 +1,30 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rsyslog
-PORTVERSION=	7.2.4
-PORTREVISION?=	2
+PORTVERSION=	7.3.15
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.rsyslog.com/files/download/rsyslog/
 
 MAINTAINER=	brd@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT?=	Syslogd supporting SQL, TCP, and TLS
+COMMENT=	Syslogd supporting SQL, TCP, and TLS
 
+GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
-LIB_DEPENDS+=	ee:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libee \
+LIB_DEPENDS=	ee:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libee \
 		estr:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libestr \
-		sysinfo:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libsysinfo \
 		json.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/json-c \
+		sysinfo:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libsysinfo \
 		uuid:${PORTSDIR}/misc/e2fsprogs-libuuid
 
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	libgcrypt-config:${PORTSDIR}/security/libgcrypt \
+		rst2man:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-docutils
+
 PORTSCOUT=	limit:^6
+PORTDOCS=	*
+PORTEXAMPLES=	*
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DBI GNUTLS GSSAPI MYSQL PGSQL RELP RFC3195 SNMP
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DBI DOCS GNUTLS GSSAPI MYSQL PGSQL RELP RFC3195 SNMP
 
 DBI_DESC=	LibDBI output module for rsyslog
 GNUTLS_DESC=	GNUTLS module for rsyslog
@@ -38,6 +43,8 @@ USES+=		pkgconfig
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-libdbi
 PLIST_FILES+=	lib/rsyslog/omlibdbi.la \
 		lib/rsyslog/omlibdbi.so
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-libdbi
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MGNUTLS}
@@ -47,6 +54,8 @@ USES+=		pkgconfig
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-gnutls
 PLIST_FILES+=	lib/rsyslog/lmnsd_gtls.la \
 		lib/rsyslog/lmnsd_gtls.so
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-gnutls
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MGSSAPI}
@@ -57,6 +66,8 @@ PLIST_FILES+=	lib/rsyslog/imgssapi.la \
 		lib/rsyslog/lmgssutil.so \
 		lib/rsyslog/omgssapi.la \
 		lib/rsyslog/omgssapi.so
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-gssapi-krb5
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMYSQL}
@@ -64,6 +75,8 @@ USE_MYSQL=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-mysql
 PLIST_FILES+=	lib/rsyslog/ommysql.so \
 					lib/rsyslog/ommysql.la
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-mysql
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPGSQL}
@@ -71,6 +84,8 @@ USE_PGSQL=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-pgsql
 PLIST_FILES+=	lib/rsyslog/ompgsql.so \
 					lib/rsyslog/ompgsql.la
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-pgsql
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MRELP}
@@ -81,6 +96,8 @@ PLIST_FILES+=	lib/rsyslog/imrelp.la \
 		lib/rsyslog/imrelp.so \
 		lib/rsyslog/omrelp.la \
 		lib/rsyslog/omrelp.so
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-relp
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MRFC3195}
@@ -89,6 +106,8 @@ USES+=		pkgconfig
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-rfc3195
 PLIST_FILES+=	lib/rsyslog/im3195.la \
 		lib/rsyslog/im3195.so
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-rfc3195
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSNMP}
@@ -96,9 +115,10 @@ LIB_DEPENDS+=	netsnmp.30:${PORTSDIR}/net
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-snmp
 PLIST_FILES+=	lib/rsyslog/omsnmp.la \
 		lib/rsyslog/omsnmp.so
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-snmp
 .endif
 
-
 .ifdef WITH_MYSQL_MICROSECONDS
 EXTRA_PATCHES+=	${FILESDIR}/extra-patch-mysql-microseconds
 .endif
@@ -111,7 +131,6 @@ CONFLICTS=	rsyslog-[56].[0-9]*
 CFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
 CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
 LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
-GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 .ifdef WITH_DEBUG
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-rtinst --enable-debug
@@ -143,12 +162,12 @@ post-patch:
 	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -name '*.bak' -delete
 
 post-install:
-.ifndef NOPORTDOCS
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	@${INSTALL} -d ${DOCSDIR}/
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/*html ${DOCSDIR}/
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/*jpg ${DOCSDIR}/
 .endif
-.ifndef NOPORTEXAMPLES
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
 	@${INSTALL} -d ${EXAMPLESDIR}
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/rsyslog-example.conf ${EXAMPLESDIR}
 .endif

++++ runtime/cryprov.h	2013-05-24 20:20:40.000000000 -0600

+ 	rsRetVal (*OnFileOpen)(void *pThis, uchar *fn, void *pFileInstData);
+ 	rsRetVal (*Encrypt)(void *pFileInstData, uchar *buf, size_t *lenBuf);
+-	rsRetVal (*OnFileClose)(void *pFileInstData, off64_t offsLogfile);
++	rsRetVal (*OnFileClose)(void *pFileInstData, off_t offsLogfile);

+ #endif /* #ifndef INCLUDED_CRYPROV_H */

+-gcryfileDestruct(gcryfile gf, off64_t offsLogfile)

+ {

+ 	if(gf == NULL)
